summary: A new report from ISACA reveals that most businesses are not seeing the expected returns on their artificial intelligence (AI) investments, despite widespread adoption. Ninety percent of digital trust professionals express concerns about the effectiveness and safety of these AI initiatives.
heading: Data Science and AI
key_points: ISACA conducted research on AI in business.
High AI adoption but low confidence in outcomes.
90% of digital trust professionals report concerns.
ticker_line: Most AI projects fail to deliver expected returns
